description: Aggregate single cells into pseudobulk profiles by summing raw counts within each combination of grouping columns (e.g. sample x cell_type) via sc.get.aggregate, exporting a genes x pseudobulk-sample count matrix plus a sample-metadata table for pydeseq2 / edgeR / limma.
rules: statistically correct route for DE between conditions, unlike per-cell rank_genes_groups
read-only input — writes pseudobulk_counts.csv + pseudobulk_samples.csv under record_store
BY is a space-separated list of obs columns to aggregate by (e.g. 'sample cell_type')
LAYER selects the raw-counts layer to sum (default counts; falls back to X)
usage: Set INPUT and BY (e.g. 'sample cell_type'). Optional: LAYER (default counts), FUNC (sum|mean|count_nonzero). Outputs: pseudobulk_counts.csv, pseudobulk_samples.csv.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder pseudobulk_counts.csv and still passes.
